# gainMetaParameterDefinition

**Instance Property**

A template for a parameter that changes the mixer’s volume gradually over a period of time.

## Declaration

```swift
var gainMetaParameterDefinition: PHASENumberMetaParameterDefinition? { get set }
```

## Discussion

When the framework creates a mixer from a mixer definition, PHASE initializes the mixer’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEPushStreamNode/gainMetaParameter] to this property’s values.

## Controlling Volume

- **gain**: The mixer’s volume.
title: gainMetaParameterDefinition
